station_address: Dahisar Check Naka, Western Urban Rd, Ketkipada, Dahisar East, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400068
text: It's on the highway. I went around 2pm, and it was shift change, so I had to wait 10 minutes. So if you're in a hurry, avoid going around 2pm. Otherwise, all other times are perfect.

station_address: Dahisar Check Naka, Western Urban Rd, Ketkipada, Dahisar East, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400068
text: This pump is adjacent to Dahisar toll naka. Since this offers only CNG, hence this one is less crowded. It's open 24/07 and the over all service is good. CNG pressure is also proper.
